QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_50

question.text: Under the new tax regime, which NPS-related deduction is available to employees?

answer.text: Section 80CCD(2) for employer contribution up to 14%

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Under the new tax regime, only Section 80CCD(2) for employer contribution (up to 14% of Basic+DA for central govt, 10% for others) is available. 80CCD(1) and 80CCD(1B) are not allowed. **The Trap:** Many candidates assume all NPS deductions are lost under the new regime. The employer contribution deduction under 80CCD(2) survives. **Cross-Exam Context:** New regime NPS benefits: only 80CCD(2) survives. Combined threshold for NPS + PF + superannuation employer contributions is Rs.7.5 lakh. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** For clients on the new tax regime, emphasize employer contribution as the primary NPS tax advantage. Encourage employers to maximize NPS contributions.
